footer.tagline: A technical team born in Abidjan, building serious software for African organizations that are moving forward.

home.heroBadge: A technical team born in Abidjan
home.heroDesc: NovaStack Africa is a young software development company. We design web applications, business platforms and analytics dashboards for African organizations with real problems to solve.
home.introText: We are at the beginning. We know it — and that is what drives us to work with more care, more attentiveness and more commitment. Every project matters to us.
home.servicesDesc1: From internal tools to customer-facing platforms, we build modern web applications that are fast, reliable, and designed to scale with your business.
home.servicesDesc2: Every project starts with a deep understanding of your business processes — then we design and build software that fits precisely, without unnecessary complexity.
home.sub2Desc: Core operational platforms that centralize your key processes.
home.sub3Desc: Secure, branded portals for real-time client access.
home.sub4Desc: Interactive analytics that turn data into decisions.
home.aiDesc: We don't add AI as an afterthought. From the start, we think about how automation, prediction and data processing can lighten the load on your teams and sharpen your decisions.
home.aiPoint2: Decision-support tools built on your data
home.aiPoint3: Predictive models adapted to your sector
home.aiPoint4: Natural language interfaces for your existing systems
home.whyDesc: Solid fundamentals, genuine listening, and solutions that serve your business.
home.why1Desc: The AI we integrate solves a real problem or it's not there. No buzzwords, no gadgets.
home.why2Desc: Every technical decision is grounded in your goals. We build what you need, not what impresses.
home.why3Desc: Short cycles, clear milestones, and continuous communication so you're never in the dark.
home.why4Desc: Thoughtful architecture, maintainable code, stable deployment. Done right from the start.
home.why5Desc: We understand infrastructure constraints, local realities, and the ambitions of African organizations.
home.why6Desc: Technologies chosen for their relevance and long-term maintainability.
home.ctaDesc: Tell us about your challenge. We listen before we propose anything.

services.title: Application Development
services.desc: From internal business tools to customer-facing platforms, we design and build modern software that is fast, reliable, and built to grow with your organization.
services.deliverTitle: Four types of software we build
services.deliverDesc: Each project is scoped and architected to match your exact use case — no templates, no shortcuts.
services.sub1Desc: Full-stack applications built with modern frameworks — performant, secure, and production-ready. From internal tools to customer-facing portals, we engineer software that scales with your ambitions.
services.sub2Desc: Core operational platforms that digitize and centralize your most critical business processes. We architect systems that serve as the backbone of your digital operations.
services.sub3Desc: Branded, secure portals that give your clients real-time access to their data and services. Strengthen relationships while reducing your support overhead.
services.sub4Desc: Interactive analytics dashboards that turn your raw data into actionable business intelligence. Make faster, better decisions with data visualizations built for your exact KPIs.
services.processDesc: A structured approach that ensures clarity, quality, and zero surprises from kickoff to launch.
services.step1Desc: We immerse ourselves in your business — processes, constraints, and goals — before writing a single line of code.
services.step2Desc: We design a technical blueprint that matches your needs today and scales with your growth tomorrow.
services.step3Desc: Agile sprints with weekly demos. You see progress continuously, not at the end.
services.step4Desc: Production launch with thorough testing, performance validation, and team onboarding.
services.step5Desc: Post-launch support, iteration cycles, and continuous improvements based on real usage data.
services.industryDesc: We work across Banking, Telecom, Logistics, Government, Healthcare, Retail, and Datacenter — with a genuine understanding of each sector's specific constraints and requirements.
services.ctaDesc: 30 minutes is enough. We'll assess your need and outline a first approach.

about.title: A serious team,
about.desc: NovaStack Africa was born in Abidjan. We are young, and we own it. What sets us apart is not tenure — it's the commitment we bring to every project and the care with which we work.
about.todayContent: We build our reputation project by project. Every client is a partner we treat with the same standards we hold ourselves to. We don't promise more than we can deliver — but what we promise, we deliver.
about.visionContent: To become a trusted technology partner for African organizations — recognized not for the size of our portfolio, but for the quality and real impact of what we build.
about.missionContent: To help African organizations solve their real operational challenges through modern, well-crafted software that fits their realities.
about.approachDesc1: Before writing a single line of code, we seek to understand your business deeply. Your processes, your constraints, what works and what doesn't.
about.approachDesc2: Then we build a solution that addresses your needs precisely — not a generic solution dressed up for the occasion. And we stay present after delivery.
about.approachItem3: Weekly updates and live demos with stakeholders
about.valuesDesc: Six principles that shape every engagement, every decision, every line of code.
about.val1Desc: Every technical decision is anchored in your business objectives. We don't build for the sake of building.
about.val2Desc: We move fast without cutting corners. Tight execution cycles, clear milestones, zero ambiguity.
about.val3Desc: We invest in your success beyond the initial delivery. Your growth is our success metric.
about.val4Desc: Designed for the realities of African enterprise — infrastructure, scale, and ambition.
about.val5Desc: We learn from every project. What we build tomorrow will be better than what we build today.
about.val6Desc: We work alongside your teams, not just for them. Knowledge transfer is part of every engagement.
about.ctaDesc: Tell us about your project. No pitch, no excessive promises — just a real conversation.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Let's start with a conversation
contact.desc: Tell us what you're working on. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with an honest first response.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your challenge, current situation, and what outcome you're looking for...
contact.errorMsg: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or contact us directly by email.

industries.label: Industries
industries.title: Solutions designed for each sector
industries.desc: Every industry has its own constraints, regulations and opportunities. We adapt our solutions to the specific realities of your field.
industries.ctaDesc: We work across many more verticals. Tell us about your context — we'll find the right approach.
industries.ind1Desc: Compliance automation, fraud detection, customer intelligence platforms, and digital banking solutions built for the modern financial institution.
industries.ind2Desc: Network monitoring systems, customer experience platforms, and AI-driven churn prediction for telecom operators across Africa.
industries.ind3Desc: Fleet management, route optimization, warehouse automation, and real-time tracking solutions for modern logistics operations.
industries.ind4Desc: Infrastructure monitoring, automated ticketing, incident management, and capacity planning tools for critical IT environments.
industries.ind5Desc: Inventory management, demand forecasting, loyalty platforms, and omnichannel retail solutions powered by AI.
industries.ind6Desc: Digital service portals, document management, citizen engagement platforms, and workflow digitization for public institutions.
industries.ind7Desc: Patient management systems, medical records digitization, appointment automation, and health data analytics platforms.
